nasb.text: Also whatever walks on its paws, among all the creatures that walk on all fours, are unclean to you; whoever touches their carcasses becomes unclean until evening,

esv.text: And all that walk on their paws, among the animals that go on all fours, are unclean to you. Whoever touches their carcass shall be unclean until the evening,

cnv.text: 所有用四足行走的動物中，用腳掌行走的，你們應以為不潔淨，觸摸牠們屍體的，都不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 所有以脚掌走路的四足动物，你们要视为不洁净，碰到它们尸体的人都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
